_README: Edit via /admin.html (recommended) or by hand here. Keep quotes and commas intact. To change photos, upload a new image to /images using the SAME filename. If this file ever breaks, the site falls back to built-in defaults.

contact.address: KL Eco City, Levels 19, Boutique Office 1 (B-O1-D), Menara 2, No. 3 Jalan Bangsar, 59200 Kuala Lumpur

highlights.title: 100% Money-Back Guarantee
highlights.description: At iMigrate Migration Solutions, we offer a 100% money-back guarantee for complete peace of mind. If you are not eligible for the service you paid for, you will receive a full refund, reflecting our commitment to a fair, transparent, and trusted process.

highlights.title: Pay As You Go
highlights.description: Enjoy flexible, stage-by-stage payment options with iMigrate Migration Solutions. Spread the cost of your immigration journey with no large upfront fees, paying only as you progress through each stage of the application process.

highlights.title: No Hidden Fees
highlights.description: At iMigrate Migration Solutions, we believe in complete transparency. Our pricing is clear and upfront, with no hidden fees or unexpected charges, so you know exactly what you're paying for from the start.

highlights.title: End-to-End Support
highlights.description: iMigrate Migration Solutions offers end-to-end immigration support from eligibility assessment through visa submission and final decision. A dedicated case manager guides you throughout the process, ensuring a smooth, accurate, and stress-free experience.

home.heroTitle: Your trusted partner for Australia & Canada immigration
home.heroSubtitle: A Malaysia-based immigration consultancy trusted by clients across Asia and worldwide. We guide you through Australia and Canada skilled migration, student, family and business visas — with a FREE consultation, money-back guarantee and flexible pay-as-you-go payments.
home.highlightsHeading: Why clients choose us with confidence
home.highlightsSubtitle: Risk-free, flexible and fully transparent immigration services built around your success.
home.whySubtitle: We combine deep immigration expertise with personalized service to deliver results that matter.
home.servicesSubtitle: Comprehensive immigration solutions tailored to your unique situation and goals.
home.successSubtitle: Real people, real results. See how we've helped clients achieve their immigration dreams.
home.ctaHeading: Ready to start your immigration journey?
home.ctaText: Take the first step today with our free eligibility assessment. Our experts will review your profile and provide personalized recommendations.

benefits.title: Specialists in Asian applicant profiles

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta
testimonials.testimonial: As a business owner from Mumbai, I was looking for a flexible route to Canada. iMigrate Migration Solutions guided me through the C11 process seamlessly. Their expertise in structuring my business plan made all the difference. I am now running my IT consulting firm in Toronto.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.testimonial: iMigrate Migration Solutions helped me navigate Australia's points system with confidence. Their team reviewed my profile thoroughly and identified the best pathway for my nursing career. The process was transparent and professional from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Rajan Kumar
testimonials.testimonial: Coming from Kuala Lumpur, I wanted a reliable partner to handle my Express Entry application. The iMigrate team was professional, responsive and kept me informed throughout the journey. I am grateful for their support in helping me and my family start a new chapter.

c11.label: Featured Program
c11.heading: C11 Entrepreneur Work Permit
c11.text: Canada's most flexible business immigration route. No minimum investment, no language test required — ideal for entrepreneurs from India, Malaysia, Singapore and beyond.
bullets: Suitable for a wide range of business types

home.faqSubheading: Quick answers about migrating to Australia and Canada — explore our full FAQ for more.

australia.heroTitle: Australia Skilled Migration & PR Visa Services
australia.heroSubtitle: Your complete guide to migrating to Australia. From the Skilled Independent Visa (Subclass 189) to employer sponsored, student, partner and business migration — our experienced consultants guide you through every pathway to Australian permanent residence.
australia.introText: Australia offers one of the world's most respected, points-based skilled migration systems. Below you'll find dedicated, in-depth guidance for each major visa category — including eligibility, benefits, key requirements, processing steps and frequently asked questions. Not sure where you fit? Start with a free eligibility assessment.

canada.heroSubtitle: Your complete guide to immigrating to Canada. From Express Entry skilled migration and the Provincial Nominee Program to work permits, study permits, family sponsorship and business pathways — our experienced consultants guide you to Canadian permanent residence.
canada.introText: Canada offers some of the world's most welcoming and well-structured immigration programs. Below you'll find dedicated, in-depth guidance for each major pathway — including eligibility, benefits, key requirements, processing steps and frequently asked questions. Not sure where you fit? Start with a free eligibility assessment.

about.heroSubtitle: We are a team of dedicated immigration professionals committed to making your dream of living in Australia or Canada a reality.
about.trustText: Every case is handled with complete transparency and care — backed by our 100% money-back guarantee and flexible pay-as-you-go options. You receive professional, ethical, and reliable immigration guidance at every step of your journey.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We operate with complete transparency and honesty in all client interactions.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We maintain the highest professional standards and stay current with immigration law changes.

values.title: Client-focused
values.description: Your success is our success. We treat every case with personalized attention.

values.title: Results-driven
values.description: Our 98.6% success rate speaks to our commitment to achieving positive outcomes.

assessment.heroSubtitle: Complete this comprehensive assessment to receive a personalized evaluation of your immigration options for Australia or Canada — or calculate your points instantly below.

contactPage.heroSubtitle: Ready to start your immigration journey? Get in touch with our expert team today or visit our office in Kuala Lumpur.

footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for Australia and Canada immigration. Expert guidance for your global journey with a proven track record of success.

australian.title: Skilled Independent Visa (189)
australian.description: Points-based permanent residence for skilled workers without employer or state sponsorship.

australian.title: State Nominated Visa (190)
australian.description: Permanent residence with state or territory government nomination for additional points.

australian.title: Employer Sponsored Visa (186)
australian.description: Permanent residence through employer sponsorship for skilled positions.

australian.title: Partner Visa (820/801)
australian.description: Temporary and permanent visas for partners and spouses of Australian citizens or PR holders.

australian.title: Student Visa (500)
australian.description: Study at Australian institutions with pathways to post-study work rights and PR.

australian.title: Business & Investor Visa
australian.description: Visas for business owners, investors, and entrepreneurs seeking Australian residence.

canadian.title: ⭐ C11 Entrepreneur Work Permit
canadian.description: Our featured program. Work permit for entrepreneurs establishing or purchasing a business in Canada — fast-track to permanent residence.

canadian.title: Express Entry
canadian.description: Fast-track permanent residence through Federal Skilled Worker, Skilled Trades, or Canadian Experience Class.

canadian.title: Provincial Nominee Program
canadian.description: Provincial and territorial programs offering additional pathways to permanent residence.

canadian.title: Start-Up Visa Program
canadian.description: Permanent residence for innovative entrepreneurs with support from designated organizations.

canadian.title: Study Permit
canadian.description: Study at Canadian institutions with post-graduation work permit opportunities.

canadian.title: Family Sponsorship
canadian.description: Sponsor your spouse, partner, parents, or dependent children for Canadian permanent residence.

business.title: Business Innovation Visa
business.description: For business owners and entrepreneurs looking to establish or develop a business.

business.title: Investor Visa Programs
business.description: Investment-based immigration pathways for high-net-worth individuals.
